plan.failureSummary: The AI agent used a stale deterministic cache to interact with the page. Although it reported success, the click on the 'Documentation' link used a negative Y-coordinate (-247px), which failed to trigger navigation. Consequently, the test remained on the homepage, causing the URL assertion to fail.
observedIndicators: negative coordinate in click tool call (-247px)
URL did not change after reported click on link

remediationSteps.summary: Delete the test cache and retry the test.
remediationSteps.details:
Remove the cached .cache-lock/<spec-file>.cache.js entry so page.ai regenerates selectors against the live DOM,
then rerun the automation to confirm recovery before escalating.
Execute the test with the 'clearPageAiCache' directive to force the agent to re-evaluate the page structure.
If a fresh run still fails, manually inspect the 'Resources' dropdown behavior to ensure the 'Documentation' link is visible and interactable.

plan.notes: The negative coordinate in tool call adhoc_768f0f936a504253b30ae1ab0b020985 is a definitive indicator of stale cache/miscalculated positioning. Clearing the cache should allow the agent to re-analyze the page and find the correct element.
